name: MHALM — Multi-Head Atlas Language Model
author: Alexandre Quemy
description: Multi-kernel LM with 5 learned readout heads (Nystrom spherical, Gabor, Laplacian, Tucker GL, linear) in 128-dim Stäckel coordinate space + BigramHash(10240). ~12.8M params trained end-to-end with torch.compile at ~100ms/step on 8xH100.
techniques: Nystrom causal kernel (dual-resolution, Gegenbauer mixture, row-sum normalised)
Gabor + Laplacian + Tucker GL cross-product heads (d_eff=128, R=128)
ComplexSSM with state carry-over + causal self-attention
